name: Atrium Daemons
description: Notifier, Lantern, Vigil-keeper, and Agent tick health

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE name = 'notifier-tick' TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE name = 'lantern-publish' TIMESERIES 10 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE name = 'vigil-keeper-tick' TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE name LIKE 'agent-%' FACET name TIMESERIES 10 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
